argument.script: async (intermediate) => { const action = "{{ action }}"; const keyword = "{{ keyword }}"; const cover = "{{ cover }}"; const limit = {{ limit }} || 10; if (action === 'search') { const url = 'https://creator.douyin.com/aweme/v1/challenge/search/?keyword=' + encodeURIComponent(keyword) + '&count=' + limit + '&aid=1128'; const res = await fetch(url, { method: 'GET', credentials: 'include', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' } }).then(r => r.json()); return (res.challenge_list ?? []).map(c => ({ name: c.challenge_info.cha_name, id: c.challenge_info.cid, view_count: c.challenge_info.view_count })); } if (action === 'suggest') { const url = 'https://creator.douyin.com/web/api/media/hashtag/rec/?cover_uri=' + encodeURIComponent(cover) + '&aid=1128'; const res = await fetch(url, { method: 'GET', credentials: 'include', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' } }).then(r => r.json()); return (res.hashtag_list ?? []).map(h => ({ name: h.name, id: h.id, view_count: h.view_count })); } if (action === 'hot') { const url = 'https://creator.douyin.com/aweme/v1/hotspot/recommend/?' + (keyword ? 'keyword=' + encodeURIComponent(keyword) + '&' : '') + 'aid=1128'; const res = await fetch(url, { method: 'GET', credentials: 'include', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' } }).then(r => r.json()); const items = res.hotspot_list ?? res.all_sentences?.map(h => ({ sentence: h.word ?? '', hot_value: h.hot_value, sentence_id: h.sentence_id ?? '' })) ?? []; return items.slice(0, limit).map(h => ({ name: h.sentence, id: 'sentence_id' in h ? h.sentence_id : '', view_count: h.hot_value })); } return []; }

description: 话题搜索 / AI推荐 / 热点词
name: Hashtag

variables.name: action
variables.help: search=关键词搜索 suggest=AI推荐 hot=热点词
